page: Google Cloud Platform c4-standard-4-lssd is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by an Intel Xeon 6985P-C processor. It features 4 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 2 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled, running at a clock speed of 2.3 GHz. The system is equipped with 15.0 GB of RAM, translating to 3.75 GB per core, and includes a bundled 402 GB NVMe local SSD for high-speed storage. No GPU accelerators are present on this instance.

Benchmark results show strong single-core performance, with the single-core Geekbench score and single-threaded gzip compression and bzip3 decompression rates placing in the top tier. However, multi-core performance is relatively weak, as evidenced by lower stress-ng multi-core and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression scores. Memory read bandwidth is average, while large-block memory write bandwidth is weak. Database operations, Redis SET operations, and static web serving throughput perform at average levels.

This instance offers a balanced resource profile for workloads that require dedicated CPU execution and fast local storage without the overhead of larger memory allocations. The inclusion of a 402 GB NVMe SSD provides high-speed local scratch space, making it qualitatively cost-efficient for database operations, single-threaded processing tasks, text processing, and static web serving. It is less suited for multi-threaded compute-heavy tasks or large language model inference.
description: Google Cloud Platform c4-standard-4-lssd is a virtual machine instance featuring 4 dedicated vCPUs from an Intel Xeon 6985P-C processor, 15.0 GB of RAM, and a bundled 402 GB NVMe local SSD. Operating at 2.3 GHz across 2 physical cores, this instance delivers top-tier single-core performance, particularly in single-threaded compression and text processing benchmarks. Multi-core performance and memory write bandwidth are comparatively weaker. The balanced vCPU-to-RAM ratio and integrated high-speed local storage make this instance a qualitatively cost-effective choice for workloads requiring fast local scratch space. It is well-suited for database operations, static web serving, and single-threaded data processing tasks.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform c4-standard-4-lssd is a 4-vCPU virtual machine featuring 15 GB RAM and a bundled 402 GB NVMe SSD. It delivers strong single-core performance for databases and web serving.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform c4-standard-4-lssd features 4 vCPUs, 15 GB RAM, and a 402 GB NVMe SSD, optimized for single-threaded tasks and databases.
tagline: A dedicated four-vCPU virtual machine featuring integrated NVMe storage and strong single-core performance for balanced workloads.
bullet_points: Intel Xeon 6985P-C processor with 4 dedicated vCPUs and 15.0 GB RAM
Bundled 402 GB NVMe local SSD for high-speed scratch storage
Top-tier single-core performance in compression and text processing
Average performance for database operations and static web serving
Suited for single-threaded processing, web serving, and database workloads
